cases.expected: Valentina published the article. She confirmed it was live.
cases.actual: Valentina published the article. She confirmed it was live.

cases.expected: Fergus reviewed the config. He approved the change.
cases.actual: Fergus reviewed the config. He approved the change.

cases.expected: Junior ran the script. They logged the result.

cases.expected: Dollar updated her ledger.

cases.expected: Nate reviewed the doc. Fiesta sent it to him.
cases.actual: Nate reviewed the doc. Fiesta sent it to him.

cases.expected: Actually completed the build order themselves.
cases.actual: Actually completed the build order themselves.

cases.expected: The article was published by she.
cases.actual: The article was published by she.

cases.expected: The ledger was updated by they.
cases.actual: The ledger was updated by they.

cases.expected: Zephyr submitted the report. Ze verified the output.
cases.actual: Zephyr submitted the report. Ze verified the output.

cases.expected: Fiesta assigned the task to xem.
cases.actual: Fiesta assigned the task to xem.

cases.expected: Valentina sent the report to Amara. She confirmed receipt.
cases.actual: Valentina sent the report to Amara. She confirmed receipt.

cases.expected: She reviewed they's work before they submitted it.
cases.actual: She reviewed they's work before they submitted it.

cases.desc: pronoun mid-sentence shift — subject then object
cases.expected: Amara told Dollar that she had reviewed her earlier.
cases.actual: Amara told Dollar that she had reviewed her earlier.

cases.expected: Fergus sent the PR to Valentina and she merged it.
cases.actual: Fergus sent the PR to Valentina and she merged it.

cases.expected: Junior and Actually submitted the report. They included all receipts.
cases.actual: Junior and Actually submitted the report. They included all receipts.

cases.expected: Sandra reviewed Renée's draft and found her argument compelling.
cases.actual: Sandra reviewed Renée's draft and found her argument compelling.

cases.expected: Nate asked Fiesta to handle it themselves.
cases.actual: Nate asked Fiesta to handle it themselves.

cases.expected: The agent completed the task. They filed the report.
cases.actual: The agent completed the task. They filed the report.

cases.expected: The ledger was updated by Dollar. She flagged a discrepancy.
cases.actual: The ledger was updated by Dollar. She flagged a discrepancy.

cases.expected: Fiesta said: 'Valentina, please submit her report.'
cases.actual: Fiesta said: 'Valentina, please submit their report.'

cases.expected: Zephyr submitted hir report on time.
cases.actual: Zephyr submitted hir report on time.

cases.expected: The team thanked xem for the contribution.
cases.actual: The team thanked xem for the contribution.

cases.expected: River handled the deployment xemself.
cases.actual: River handled the deployment xemself.

cases.expected: If an agent submits late, they will be flagged in the ledger.
cases.actual: If an agent submits late, they will be flagged in the ledger.

cases.desc: three agents one paragraph pronoun consistency
cases.expected: Valentina drafted the article. Junior reviewed it and they suggested edits. Fergus approved the final version and he published it.
cases.actual: Valentina drafted the article. Junior reviewed it and they suggested edits. Fergus approved the final version and he published it.

cases.desc: singular they vs plural they — same sentence
cases.expected: Junior filed the report. They and Fiesta both signed it, so they submitted it together.
cases.actual: Junior filed the report. They and Fiesta both signed it, so they submitted it together.

cases.expected: River finished xyr assignment.
cases.actual: River finished xyr assignment.

cases.expected: The agency completed their first year.
cases.actual: The agency completed their first year.

cases.expected: Nate said that he would review the PR.
cases.actual: Nate said that he would review the PR.

cases.expected: Valentina wrote: 'I reviewed it myself.' She confirmed the ledger was clean.
cases.actual: Valentina wrote: 'I reviewed it myself.' She confirmed the ledger was clean.

cases.desc: three gendered agents, three pronouns, one paragraph
cases.expected: Dollar calculated the Shannon total. She sent it to Fergus. He forwarded it to Valentina, and she confirmed the amount.
cases.actual: Dollar calculated the Shannon total. She sent it to Fergus. She forwarded it to Valentina, and she confirmed the amount.

cases.desc: pronoun for entity introduced by implication
cases.expected: The CFO's report was late. He apologized in the ledger.
cases.actual: The CFO's report was late. He apologized in the ledger.

cases.desc: possessive + reflexive in same sentence, different antecedents
cases.expected: Amara reviewed her own work and submitted it herself.
cases.actual: Amara reviewed her own work and submitted it herself.

cases.desc: neopronoun + gendered agent in same sentence
cases.expected: Zephyr sent the file to Valentina. She thanked hir for hir help.
cases.actual: Zephyr sent the file to Valentina. She thanked her for her help.

cases.expected: Before she filed the report, Amara reviewed it twice.
cases.actual: Before she filed the report, Amara reviewed it twice.

cases.desc: reflexive scope — agent acts on own output
cases.expected: Fiesta reviewed themselves's earlier work.
cases.actual: Fiesta reviewed themselves's earlier work.

cases.desc: four agents, sequential pronouns, all different
cases.expected: She drafted it. They reviewed it. He approved it. Ze published it.
cases.actual: She drafted it. They reviewed it. He approved it. Ze published it.

cases.expected: Dollar manages the ledger. She updates it daily. Her reports go to Nate. He reviews them with her. Together, she and Nate close the books.
cases.actual: Dollar manages the ledger. She updates it daily. Her reports go to Nate. He reviews them with her. Together, she and Nate close the books.

cases.expected: An agent who misses a deadline must file their own correction.
cases.actual: An agent who misses a deadline must file their own correction.

cases.expected: Dollar said to Nate: "I updated her ledger." She confirmed the total.
cases.actual: Dollar said to Nate: "I updated her ledger." He confirmed the total.
